_comment: Single source of truth for blog posts. Order is newest-first; run `npm run build` after editing.

posts.title: The Workflow I've Settled On for AI-Assisted Development
posts.excerpt: Using Copilot as a sounding board, separating data from presentation, and turning successful workflows into reusable skills—how AI changed the way I think, not just how I write code.
posts.excerptHome: Using Compound Engineering's Ideate and Brainstorm skills as a sounding board, separating data from presentation, and turning successful workflows into reusable skills—how AI changed the way I think, not just how I write code.

posts.title: Returning to Myself
posts.excerpt: A visit back home after two years, rediscovering the people who shaped me, the gestures that feel bigger with age, and a sense of belonging I had almost forgotten.

posts.title: Shanashma - A Claude Code Plugin Marketplace for Azure DevOps
posts.excerpt: Building a Claude Code plugin with persistent configuration to solve the multi-project Azure DevOps workflow problem, packaged as a shareable plugin marketplace.

posts.title: Building a Claude Agent for Continuous Codebase Improvement
posts.excerpt: Building a Claude sub-agent workflow to continuously analyze and improve codebases with small, incremental changes—using a finder, implementer, and reviewer pattern.

posts.title: Teaching Machines to Find the Right Reviewers
posts.excerpt: Building a machine learning recommendation system to intelligently assign code reviewers based on historical patterns, expertise, and context—moving beyond static path-based rules.
posts.excerptHome: Building a machine learning recommendation system to intelligently assign code reviewers based on historical patterns, expertise, and context.

posts.title: Understanding Authentication: OpenID Connect
posts.excerpt: Learn how to outsource user authentication to Microsoft using OpenID Connect. A practical guide with code examples showing how to implement federated authentication in a FastAPI application.
posts.excerptHome: Learn how to outsource user authentication to Microsoft using OpenID Connect with practical code examples.

posts.title: Understanding Authentication: A Simple Dive into OAuth 2.0
posts.excerpt: Explore how authentication works—from basic password-based login to modern, secure methods like OpenID Connect—through the lens of a simple library app.
posts.excerptHome: Explore how authentication works from basic password-based login to modern, secure methods like OpenID Connect.
